# Transcrição: 33. Trait 32 - Great Salespeople are obsessed with building clientele.

- **Fonte:** 33. Trait 32 - Great Salespeople are obsessed with building clientele.
- **Duração:** 01:04
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:04]

Great salespeople are obsessed with building clientele. Look, they're building a business one customer at a time, but they're not building it for the one customer. Look, that's why you're missing motivation. The greats are motivated because they're building a big business. I was talking yesterday to a friend of mine. Look, man, you've got to think about how big you can build this, because that's where the motivation's at. When you're thinking about, I'm going to go get 10 deals or 20 deals, or do you got to think in terms of getting thousands of deals that get you so excited that you're like, oh my God, I'm building a business, a business here that will grow and live and have a heartbeat and a continuation and survive no matter what happens. And all of a sudden, you're going to find all this creativity just bursting out of you. This greatness that sits down inside of each of us is many times just covered up because we don't have the right size goal. You're building a business, okay? Each customer is an integral part of building this business. Build for the long term, not just for this week or this month, and you will be great. You'll find greatness and you'll build a great business.
